question: Return a table with the top 10 acquisition channels ranked by delivered net revenue, including columns acquisition_channel, delivered_orders, delivered_net_revenue, and avg_delivered_order_value.
sql_query:
WITH delivered_orders AS (
    SELECT o.order_id, c.acquisition_channel
    FROM core.orders o
    JOIN core.customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
    WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered'
),
order_payments AS (
    SELECT do.order_id, do.acquisition_channel, COALESCE(SUM(p.payment_value), 0) AS total_payment
    FROM delivered_orders do
    LEFT JOIN core.payments p ON do.order_id = p.order_id
    GROUP BY do.order_id, do.acquisition_channel
),
order_refunds AS (
    SELECT do.order_id, COALESCE(SUM(r.refund_amount), 0) AS total_refund
    FROM delivered_orders do
    LEFT JOIN core.order_items oi ON do.order_id = oi.order_id
    LEFT JOIN core.returns r ON oi.order_item_id = r.order_item_id
    GROUP BY do.order_id
),
order_metrics AS (
    SELECT op.acquisition_channel,
           op.order_id,
           op.total_payment,
           ort.total_refund,
           (op.total_payment - ort.total_refund) AS net_revenue
    FROM order_payments op
    LEFT JOIN order_refunds ort ON op.order_id = ort.order_id
)
SELECT acquisition_channel,
       COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS delivered_orders,
       ROUND(SUM(net_revenue)::numeric, 2) AS delivered_net_revenue,
       ROUND((SUM(net_revenue) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT order_id), 0))::numeric, 2) AS avg_delivered_order_value
FROM order_metrics
GROUP BY acquisition_channel
ORDER BY delivered_net_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10
pandas_sql_query: WITH delivered_order_values AS (SELECT o.order_id, c.acquisition_channel, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price - oi.discount_amount) AS delivered_order_net_value FROM customers c JOIN orders o USING (customer_id) JOIN order_items oi USING (order_id) WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY 1, 2) SELECT acquisition_channel, COUNT(*) AS delivered_orders, ROUND(SUM(delivered_order_net_value), 2) AS delivered_net_revenue, ROUND(AVG(delivered_order_net_value), 2) AS avg_delivered_order_value FROM delivered_order_values GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY delivered_net_revenue DESC, acquisition_channel LIMIT 10
